name: Hartej Singh
tagline: Photography, fiction, music, and video - and I'm open to work.
pitch: Available for photography shoots, writing commissions, and YouTube collaborations.
bio: I'm Hartej - a Washington-based creator working across photography, fiction, music, and video. I shoot landscapes and travel (from the Oregon coast to Australia), portraits, and events; I'm writing the four-book 4Corner Collection of fiction; and I make gaming and guitar content on YouTube as @Jogeyes. I care about mood, story, and the small details most people walk past. If something here resonates, let's make something together.
about: Hi, I'm Hartej Singh — a high school student in Sammamish, Washington who likes building things and telling stories. I train machine-learning models and write software, author the four-book 4Corner Collection of fiction, shoot photography, and make music and video. Outside of that I teach Python to younger students, help run community events, volunteer around Seattle, and play tennis. I'm curious about a lot, and this site is where it all lives.
